description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Continuous Integration v2 that runs on a schedule, on workflow dispatch, and on pull requests. The workflow has four jobs: CI, Publish, Documentation, and Formatting. The CI job runs on multiple operating systems and configurations, checks out the code, caches and installs the Vulkan SDK, sets up C++, builds and tests NovelRT, and uploads test results. The Publish job downloads artifacts and publishes test results. The Documentation job generates documentation on Ubuntu. The Formatting job checks code formatting on Ubuntu.
